channel.title: Eternal Record
channel.description: Daily cinematic mythology stories — 90-second vertical videos.
channel.itunes:author: Ayush Rana

item.title: The Unyielding Envy of Sisupala
item.description: Today's story will change how you see everything... In the kingdom of Madra, there lived a king named Sisupala, known for his unwavering ambition. His envy knew no bounds as he watched his half-brother, Karna, excel in every arena. Sisupala's jealousy burned brighter than the stars in the night sky, fueling his every move. He sought to usurp the throne, no matter the cost. As he approached the royal gathering where Karna was to be crowned, Sisupala's resentment boiled over. He hurled curses and insults, his words dripping with malice. But Karna stood tall, untouched by the venom of Sisupala's envy. And so, the cycle of hatred continued, Sisupala consumed by the very sin that destroyed his soul. This is Envy — the poison that seeps into our hearts, blinding us to the beauty of others' triumphs. It's the reason we tear down those who rise above us, forgetting that our own greatness lies within.
